name: Foolproof Dark Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Semi-sweet chocolate chips (1-1/2 12 oz. packages)
recipeInstructions:
Line an 8-inch or 9-inch square pan with foil. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate chips with sweetened condensed milk and salt. Remove from heat; stir in walnuts and vanilla. Spread evenly into prepared pan. Refrigerate 2 hours or until firm. Remove from pan; place on a cutting board. Peel off foil; cut into squares. Store loosely covered at room temperature. About 5 dozen pieces or 2 pounds.
Variation:
Touchdown Chocolate Fudge: After adding nuts and vanilla, cool for 10 to 12 minutes. On the foil-lined baking sheet, quickly and gently form into football shape (do not overwork). Refrigerate as above. Place on a serving plate. Garnish as desired. About 2 pounds.
